stemHtml:
Given the following NOTAM information, which statement is correct?

TIL 1603312000 SCHEDULE: MON-FRI 0700-2200, SAT-SUN 0800-2000 RADAR SERVICES FROM FARNBOROUGH LOWER AIRSPACE RADAR SERVICE WEST FREQ 125.250MHZ MAY NOT BE AVAILABLE AT TIMES DUE TO ESSENTIAL ENGINEERING MAINTAINTENCE AND TESTING. BASIC SERVICE WILL CONTINUE TO BE AVAILABLE. : NOTAM EG/B0086/16 >>> END OF BULLETIN <<<

options.a: Until 31st March 2016, 20:00 UTC, RADAR services are NOT available.
options.b: BASIC service MAY NOT be available during the quoted times of day.
options.c: RADAR services MAY NOT be available during the quoted times of day.
options.d: RADAR services are available only on MON&FRI 07:00&22:00 and SAT&SUN 08:00&20:00.
